title: INFLATION Inc.
description:
You're a lewd scientist from INFLATION Inc.; a research corporation tasked by the government to experiment on women in the name of science! (probably)

Their goal is to unlock the secrets of FEMALE GROWTH and to do this, they continuously "inject" white sperm-like juices inside the female subjects to "inflate" them and thus simulate natural growth.

What the hell are they thinking?!?!

Details and featuresINFLATION Inc. is an odd simulation game where your task is to "inflate" girls through juice experiments. You will be rewarded for doing so!

• Inflate 6 unique and diversified characters

• Unlock different size variations for each character

• Complete click-based levels with increasing difficulty

• Purchase unique items from the in-game shop

• Pseudo-simulation mechanics

• Customizable inflation gameplay

• Sandbox gallery for viewing scenes
description_short: You're a lewd scientist from INFLATION Inc.; a research corporation tasked by the government to experiment on women in the name of science! Their goal is to unlock the secrets of FEMALE GROWTH and you must help them achieve this goal!
